name: Dynamix Corp
business: Blank check company formed to effect a merger, currently pursuing a business combination with The Ether Machine, Inc. Has not commenced operations and generates no operating revenues.

exposures.sentence: The integration of artificial intelligence (AI) across various industries is set to drive a strong surge in power demand.

These include, but are not limited to, businesses focused across energy, infrastructure and renewable sectors, including participation in E&P, midstream, oilfield services, power and digital infrastructure.
